outcome_contract.why: A fashion brand's only customer contact email being a hostel Gmail address damages
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Caryina uses a dedicated brand email address on its own

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Support page renders hardcoded email at `support/page.tsx:80-82`; success page renders via CONTACT_EMAIL
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Support page bypass of constant is a pre-existing bug

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: CONTACT_EMAIL appears in Privacy Policy as the GDPR data-rights contact address — must be a monitored, responsive address
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: If new address is unmonitored, privacy rights requests go unacknowledged — a GDPR compliance risk

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `route.test.ts:53` has email hardcoded — will break after change
`site-content.generated.json:164` hardcodes the email in prose — separate from constant
String constant change; no performance implications
Low risk rollout; rollback is updating the constant value. Key dependency: new email must be live and monitored before deploying
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: If new email is dead on deploy, returns and privacy requests are silently lost

open_operator_questions: What should the brand email address be?

stage_payload.scope_summary: The customer-facing contact email for Caryina is `hostelpositano@gmail.com` — the email address of the Brikette hostel business, not a Caryina brand email. This appears on the support page, in four legal policy documents (Terms, Privacy, Returns, Cookie Policy), in order-confirmation emails sent to customers, and in the returns-request system email. The fix has two components: (1) a business decision — what the brand email address should be and how it is routed; and (2) a code change — updating the constant, fixing a hardcoded occurrence on the support page that is not wired to the constant, a
goals: Replace `hostelpositano@gmail.com` with a brand email across all customer-facing surfaces.
Fix the `support/page.tsx` hardcoding to use the centralised `CONTACT_EMAIL` constant
Update **both** tracked copies of the generated site-content JSON — `contentPacket.ts`
Recommend an env-var approach so the email is configurable without code deploys; use a
Surface the `MERCHANT_NOTIFY_EMAIL` gap for the operator to address in the same pass.
non_goals: Setting up or migrating the email delivery infrastructure (SMTP/Resend) — this is
Changing the legal entity details (Skylar SRL, VAT number, registered address) — those
constraints: `CONTACT_EMAIL` is a compile-time constant in `legalContent.ts`. Until an env-var
`caryina.com` is already the brand domain used in sitemap, robots, and notification
assumptions: The operator controls or can set up email forwarding on `caryina.com` (this is an
A simple email forward (e.g. `hello@caryina.com` → personal Gmail) is acceptable as
key_entry_points: `apps/caryina/src/lib/legalContent.ts:25` — `CONTACT_EMAIL` constant, single source of truth for all policy documents
`apps/caryina/src/app/[lang]/support/page.tsx:80-82` — support page hardcodes the email directly (not via constant)

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: [Correctness] [Major]: hardcoded email bypasses constant — won't update with constant change
None — uses constant; monitoring risk noted
[Correctness] [Minor]: hardcoded prose string not via constant
[Testing] [Major]: hardcoded expected email will fail after constant change
[Correctness] [Minor]: defaults to personal Gmail in prod

process_topology.trigger: A customer visits the support page, receives an order confirmation, submits
process_topology.end_condition: Customer sees or receives `hostelpositano@gmail.com` as the brand contact.

areas.label: Support page
areas.flow: Customer navigates to `/[lang]/support` → page renders with hardcoded `hostelpositano@gmail.com` as `href` and display text
areas.issues: Email is hardcoded in JSX, not using `CONTACT_EMAIL` constant — will not auto-update when constant is changed

areas.label: Legal policies
areas.flow: `CONTACT_EMAIL` constant imported from `legalContent.ts` and interpolated into Terms, Privacy, Returns, Cookie Policy text
areas.issues: Single constant controls all four policy documents — updating the constant updates all four

areas.label: Order confirmation emails
areas.flow: `notifications.server.ts` imports `CONTACT_EMAIL` and includes it in the customer-facing confirmation email body

areas.label: Returns-request flow
areas.flow: Customer submits returns form → system emails customer (confirming receipt) and emails merchant (to action the request) at `CONTACT_EMAIL`
areas.issues: Returns go to the hostel Gmail; correct address needed to reach the Caryina operator

areas.label: Generated site content
areas.flow: `site-content.generated.json` channels EN copy includes `hostelpositano@gmail.com` hardcoded as human-readable text
areas.issues: Requires regeneration or direct edit to update

areas.label: Merchant ops alerts
areas.flow: Checkout anomalies and notify-me captures sent to `MERCHANT_NOTIFY_EMAIL` env var, defaulting to `peter.cowling1976@gmail.com`
areas.issues: Not customer-facing but not a brand address; requires env var in production to override
